name: tobacco-price-desktop
description: 烟草价格查询系统桌面应用

scripts.build: echo '请手动将index.html和index.js复制到本地运行'
scripts.build:pkg: pkg . --targets node18-win-x64 --output dist/tobacco-price.tmp.exe --public-packages "*" && node patch-subsystem.js dist/tobacco-price.tmp.exe && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop';$src='dist/tobacco-price.tmp.exe';$dst='dist/tobacco-price.exe';$fallback=('dist/tobacco-price-'+(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss')+'.exe');for($i=0;$i -lt 60;$i++){try{if(Test-Path $dst){Remove-Item $dst -Force};Move-Item $src $dst -Force;if((Test-Path $dst) -and -not (Test-Path $src)){exit 0}}catch{Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100}};Move-Item $src $fallback -Force;Write-Host ('dist/tobacco-price.exe 被占用，已输出到 '+$fallback);exit 0"
